workstreams.title: Memory backbone
workstreams.exit_gate: T3 tables have non-zero rows; CHGs and lessons in PG; history-of-X query returns complete results

workstreams.title: Linking model
workstreams.exit_gate: entity_links table exists; backfill completeness >90%; multi-hop query works

workstreams.title: Keys, sprints, JSON normalization
workstreams.exit_gate: canonical sprint FK; 0 unsprinted tickets; JSON derived/read-only; PG SSOT proven

workstreams.title: DNA leanness
workstreams.exit_gate: rule dedupe audit; single canonical rules file; at least one deterministic gate blocks violation; JIT loader

workstreams.title: Judge-hardening
workstreams.exit_gate: verdict_log live, keyed, well-formed; PASS requires checks_run; judgment gates

overall_exit_gate: History-of-X queries for real messy entities (CONTENT-0001, TKT-0546, multi-link CHG) return complete linked time-ordered results entirely from PG, sustained over a window; DNA lean; verdict_log hardened; no vector changes

reporting.dashboard_query: SELECT ws_id, title, status FROM jsonb_to_recordset((SELECT workstreams FROM state_crestv2_p1_tracker))
